title: The Figma design agent is here
summary: Starting today, work with an agent that is built for Figma—directly on the canvas.

title: A new chapter: Friends of Figma’s brand refresh tells the story of a global community
summary: From São Paulo to Seoul, Friends of Figma chapters around the world are distinct, vibrant, and locally rooted. Our new brand gives them a more authentic way to express themselves.

title: What the design-to-code loop unlocks
summary: With work moving more fluidly between code and canvas, workflows aren’t just changing—they’re converging.
